Library Management

These routines are used for initializing and terminating the CSyn library. More...

Defines

#define CSYN_DEBUG_REPORT   (1)
#define CSYN_DEBUG_THREAD   (2)
#define CSYN_RESERVED_3   (3)
#define CSYN_RESERVED_4   (4)
#define CSYN_DEBUG_GET_ALLOCS   (5)
#define CSYN_DEBUG_INTERNAL   (6)
#define CSYN_TRACE_SILENT   (0)
#define CSYN_TRACE_TERSE   (1<<0)
#define CSYN_TRACE_VERBOSE   (1<<1)

Functions

CSynContext CSyn_CreateContext (void)
 Allocate the CSynContext.

void CSyn_DeleteContext (CSynContext context)
 Delete the CSynContext allocated by CSyn_CreateContext().

CSynErr CSyn_Initialize (CSynContext context)
 Initialize the CSynContext.

CSynErr CSyn_Terminate (CSynContext context)
 Calls CSyn_Stop() just in case not already stopped.

CSynErr CSyn_Start (CSynContext context, uint32 flags, double frameRate)
 Start running the synthesis process.

CSynErr CSyn_StartDevices (CSynContext context, uint32 flags, double frameRate, PaDeviceID inputDevice, int numInputChannels, PaDeviceID outputDevice, int numOutputChannels)
 Start running the synthesis process.

CSynErr CSyn_Stop (CSynContext context)
 Stop the synthesis process.

CSynErr CSyn_StartEngine (CSynContext context, uint32 flags, double frameRate)
 Calls CSyn_Initialize() and CSyn_Start().

CSynErr CSyn_StopEngine (CSynContext context)
 Calls CSyn_Terminate().

const char * CSyn_ErrorCodeToText (CSynErr errorCode)
CSynErr CSyn_CheckEngineErrors (CSynContext context)
 Check to see if engine encountered any errors.

double CSyn_GetUsage (CSynContext context)
 Returns fraction of CPU used by synthesis engine.

int32 CSyn_GetVersion (void)
int32 CSyn_GetExpirationDate (void)
int32 CSyn_GetObjectCount (CSynContext context)
int32 CSyn_Debug (CSynContext context, int32 id, int32 data)
void CSyn_SetTrace (CSynContext context, uint32 mask)
 Set flags to control printed messages for debugging and tracing code.

uint32 CSyn_GetTrace (CSynContext context)

Detailed Description

These routines are used for initializing and terminating the CSyn library.

Define Documentation

#define CSYN_DEBUG_GET_ALLOCS   (5)
 

#define CSYN_DEBUG_INTERNAL   (6)
 

#define CSYN_DEBUG_REPORT   (1)
 

#define CSYN_DEBUG_THREAD   (2)
 

#define CSYN_RESERVED_3   (3)
 

#define CSYN_RESERVED_4   (4)
 

#define CSYN_TRACE_SILENT   (0)
 

#define CSYN_TRACE_TERSE   (1<<0)
 

#define CSYN_TRACE_VERBOSE   (1<<1)
 

Function Documentation

CSynErr CSyn_CheckEngineErrors (  CSynContext  context  ) 
 

Check to see if engine encountered any errors.

Called periodically by sleep routines to keep BackToFront FIFO clear.

CSynContext CSyn_CreateContext (  void   ) 
 

Allocate the CSynContext.

int32 CSyn_Debug (  CSynContext  context,
int32  id,
int32  data
) 
 

void CSyn_DeleteContext (  CSynContext  context  ) 
 

Delete the CSynContext allocated by CSyn_CreateContext().

const char* CSyn_ErrorCodeToText (  CSynErr  errorCode  ) 
 

Returns:
string pointer containing an explanatory error message.

int32 CSyn_GetExpirationDate (  void   ) 
 

int32 CSyn_GetObjectCount (  CSynContext  context  ) 
 

Returns:
number of Units, Samples, Tables and other objects allocated.

uint32 CSyn_GetTrace (  CSynContext  context  ) 
 

Returns:
current trace level as set by CSyn_SetTrace()

double CSyn_GetUsage (  CSynContext  context  ) 
 

Returns fraction of CPU used by synthesis engine.

A value of 0.1 means 10% of the CPU time is spent on synthesis.

int32 CSyn_GetVersion (  void   ) 
 

CSynErr CSyn_Initialize (  CSynContext  context  ) 
 

Initialize the CSynContext.

Returns:
0 or a negative error code.

void CSyn_SetTrace (  CSynContext  context,
uint32  mask
) 
 

Set flags to control printed messages for debugging and tracing code.

Parameters:
mask CSYN_TRACE_SILENT or CSYN_TRACE_TERSE or CSYN_TRACE_VERBOSE

CSynErr CSyn_Start (  CSynContext  context,
uint32  flags,
double  frameRate
) 
 

Start running the synthesis process.

Open access to the audio device.

Parameters:
flags CSYN_F_NON_REAL_TIME or other flags may be ORed together.
frameRate Typically 44100.0 but any rate the audio hardware will support is allowed.

CSynErr CSyn_StartDevices (  CSynContext  context,
uint32  flags,
double  frameRate,
PaDeviceID  inputDevice,
int  numInputChannels,
PaDeviceID  outputDevice,
int  numOutputChannels
) 
 

Start running the synthesis process.

Open access to the audio device. Extended call that allows specification of PortAudio options. Because the device IDs are passed explicitly, the flags CSYN_F_ENABLE_INPUT and CSYN_F_DISABLE_OUTPUT are ignored.

CSynErr CSyn_StartEngine (  CSynContext  context,
uint32  flags,
double  frameRate
) 
 

Calls CSyn_Initialize() and CSyn_Start().

CSynErr CSyn_Stop (  CSynContext  context  ) 
 

Stop the synthesis process.

CSynErr CSyn_StopEngine (  CSynContext  context  ) 
 

Calls CSyn_Terminate().

CSynErr CSyn_Terminate (  CSynContext  context  ) 
 

Calls CSyn_Stop() just in case not already stopped.

Deletes allocated resources.
